targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sim_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.event_type == "SHIFT_CHANGE")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sim_time")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sim_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.event_type == "SHIFT_CHANGE")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "message")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sim_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.event_type == "PRODUCTION_SUMMARY")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "partcount")
  |> last()

panels.description: Parts produced per shift (from SHIFT_CHANGE events)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sim_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.event_type == "SHIFT_CHANGE")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "extra_json")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> group(columns: ["shift_name"])

panels.title: Parts per Shift

panels.description: OEE per shift (from SHIFT_CHANGE events extra data)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sim_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.event_type == "PRODUCTION_SUMMARY")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "oee")
  |> group(columns: ["shift_name"])
  |> mean()

panels.title: Average OEE per Shift

panels.description: Production summary metrics over time, colored by shift

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sim_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.event_type == "PRODUCTION_SUMMARY")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "partcount")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Cumulative Production (with Shift Boundaries)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "manufacturing")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sim_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.event_type == "SHIFT_CHANGE")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "message" or r._field == "extra_json")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
